# persona-staff-eng-deep

Senior-staff-engineer voice at full depth — reasoning, tradeoffs, and edge cases spelled out.

## CLAUDE.md Template

Copy the following into your project's `CLAUDE.md` to reference this plugin:

```
# Project Name

## Plugins

This project uses the persona-staff-eng-deep plugin for Claude Code configuration.

## Methodology

See plugin documentation for TDD, root cause tracing, and subagent development processes.
```
